title: MVP Blockers: Host Onboarding + Subscription Checkout

tasks.title: Add i18n keys for host onboarding namespace
tasks.description:
Create the `host.*` i18n namespace in `packages/i18n/src/locales/es/host.json`. Must cover all labels, placeholders, error messages, and status strings used by the property form, autosave indicator, draft resume prompt, and the /mi-cuenta/propiedades page.

Key sections: `form.sections.*` (datos-basicos, ubicacion, capacidad, amenities, fotos, precio, contacto, publicar), `form.actions.*` (guardar, publicar, publicando), `form.status.*` (guardando, guardado, error), `form.draftPrompt.*`, `properties.list.*`, `properties.card.*`, `properties.empty.*`.

Also create stub files `en/host.json` and `pt/host.json` with the same keys as Spanish but with placeholder values (e.g., `"[TODO]"`). Register the namespace in `packages/i18n/src/index.ts` or wherever namespaces are exported.

Acceptance criteria:
- `es/host.json` has all keys referenced in T-003 through T-015
- `en/host.json` and `pt/host.json` exist as stubs
- TypeScript types generated from i18n compile without errors
- `pnpm typecheck` passes in `packages/i18n`

tasks.title: Add i18n keys for checkout result pages
tasks.description:
Create the `checkout.*` namespace keys in `packages/i18n/src/locales/es/billing.json` (or a new `checkout.json` if the billing namespace is already large). Must cover all strings for success, pending, and failure pages plus the `PlanPurchaseButton` component.

Key sections: `checkout.success.*` (title, subtitle, cta), `checkout.pending.*` (title, body, cta), `checkout.failure.*` (title, body, retryCta, supportCta), `checkout.button.*` (cta, processing, error, unauthCta).

Create stub files `en/` and `pt/` counterparts. Register namespace if new.

Acceptance criteria:
- All keys referenced in T-017 through T-025 are present
- `pnpm typecheck` passes in `packages/i18n`

tasks.title: Implement HOST role auto-assignment hook logic in AccommodationService
tasks.description:
Extend `packages/service-core/src/services/accommodation/accommodation.service.ts` to auto-assign the `HOST` role to the owning user when an accommodation transitions to `PUBLISHED` status for the first time.

Implementation:
- Override `_beforeUpdate`: read current entity status and store it in `ctx.hookState.previousStatus`
- Override `_afterUpdate`: check `entity.status === 'PUBLISHED'` and `hookState.previousStatus !== 'PUBLISHED'`
- If transition confirmed: fetch user's current roles via `UserService` or direct user model; if user has neither `HOST` nor `OWNER` role, assign `HOST` via the user service
- Use `PermissionEnum` checks, not role checks
- May need to inject `UserService` into `AccommodationService` constructor — verify no circular dependency before injecting

Key files:
- `packages/service-core/src/services/accommodation/accommodation.service.ts`

Acceptance criteria:
- `pnpm typecheck` passes in `packages/service-core`
- No circular dependency introduced between services
- Logic is correct but tests are NOT in this task (see T-004)

tasks.title: Write unit tests for HOST role auto-assignment hook
tasks.description:
Write unit tests for the HOST role auto-assignment logic implemented in T-003.

Test file: `packages/service-core/test/services/accommodation/roleAssignment.test.ts`

Test cases:
- HOST role assigned when accommodation transitions to PUBLISHED for the first time
- No duplicate assignment if user already has HOST role
- No assignment if user already has OWNER role
- No assignment when transitioning to any status other than PUBLISHED (e.g., DRAFT, SUSPENDED)
- Hook state correctly carries `previousStatus` from `_beforeUpdate` to `_afterUpdate`

Acceptance criteria:
- All test cases pass
- `pnpm test` passes in `packages/service-core` targeting the new test file
- No `.only()` or hard-coded `.skip()` in committed tests

tasks.title: Create useAutosave hook
tasks.description:
Create the autosave React hook for the property form.

File: `apps/web/src/hooks/useAutosave.ts`

Props: `{ formData, accommodationId, onSaveSuccess, onSaveError }`

Behavior:
- Debounce 30s timer + blur trigger
- First save (no `accommodationId`): POST `/api/v1/protected/accommodations/`
- Subsequent saves: PATCH `/api/v1/protected/accommodations/{id}`
- Returns: `{ saveStatus: 'idle' | 'saving' | 'saved' | 'error', lastSavedAt, triggerSave }`
- On error: retry once after 5s
- Last-write-wins concurrency (no optimistic lock check needed for MVP)
- Named export only

Unit tests in `apps/web/test/hooks/useAutosave.test.ts`:
- Timer fires after 30s debounce
- Blur trigger fires save
- Transitions: idle → saving → saved
- Error state + retry after 5s
- POST on first save (no accommodationId), PATCH on subsequent saves

Acceptance criteria:
- `useAutosave` correctly switches from POST to PATCH after first successful save
- All unit tests pass
- `pnpm typecheck` passes for `apps/web`

tasks.title: Create usePropertyForm hook
tasks.description:
Create the form state management React hook for the property form.

File: `apps/web/src/hooks/usePropertyForm.ts`

- Manages React Hook Form state for the 8 sections
- Validates against `AccommodationInsertSchema` from `@repo/schemas`
- Returns: `{ form, sections, completedSections, isFormComplete, handlePublish }`
- `completedSections`: Set of section keys where all required fields are valid
- `isFormComplete`: boolean — all required fields across all sections are filled
- Named export only

Unit tests in `apps/web/test/hooks/usePropertyForm.test.ts`:
- Section completion tracking: `completedSections` updates when all required fields in a section are valid
- `isFormComplete` returns false when any required field is empty
- `isFormComplete` returns true when all required fields across all sections are filled
- `handlePublish` triggers submission correctly

Acceptance criteria:
- Hook compiles with strict TypeScript
- `isFormComplete` logic covers all 8 sections
- All unit tests pass

- Implement file selection (input + drag-and-drop event handlers)
- Call upload endpoint per file with multipart/form-data
- Track per-file upload progress state
- Enforce max 20 images client-side (reject additional files)
- Handle upload errors inline per file (error state per file entry)
- Dynamic import of any heavy deps to avoid SSR issues
- Props: `{ value: string[], onChange: (urls: string[]) => void, maxImages?: number }`

Acceptance criteria:
- Upload endpoint path verified from actual API routes before implementing
- Max 20 images enforced (additional files rejected with user-visible message)
- `onChange` called with updated URL array after each successful upload
- `pnpm typecheck` passes for `apps/web`

tasks.title: Create PlanPurchaseButton.client.tsx island
tasks.description:
Create the checkout trigger React island for the pricing page.

File: `apps/web/src/components/billing/PlanPurchaseButton.client.tsx`

Props:
```ts
{
  planId: string
  price: number
  currency: 'ARS' | 'USD'
  ctaText: string
}
```

Behavior:
- Reads auth session (`auth-client.ts` from `apps/web/src/lib/`) to determine if user is logged in
- Unauthenticated: button click redirects to `/auth/signin?redirect=/suscriptores/planes`
- Authenticated: button click POSTs to `POST /api/v1/protected/billing/checkout` with `{ planId }` — verify exact protected path before implementation from `apps/api/src/routes/billing/index.ts:115`
  - Loading state: spinner + `Procesando...` text; button disabled; `aria-label` updated for screen readers
  - Success: `window.location.href = response.checkoutUrl` (redirect to MercadoPago initPoint)
  - API error: inline error message below button `No pudimos iniciar el pago. Intentá de nuevo.`; button re-enabled
- No double-submission: button disabled while in flight
- Named export only

Acceptance criteria:
- Button disabled during in-flight request
- Auth redirect includes correct return URL
- Inline error clears on next click attempt
- `aria-label` updated to `Procesando...` during loading
- `pnpm typecheck` passes for `apps/web`

- Page title/meta: `Pago aprobado — Hospeda`

**`apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/suscriptores/checkout/pending.astro`**
- No auth required
- Shows `Tu pago está siendo procesado` + explanatory text (up to 24h) + CTA `Verificar estado` → `/mi-cuenta`
- No retry button
- Page title/meta: `Pago en proceso — Hospeda`

All user-facing strings via i18n keys from T-002.

Acceptance criteria:
- Pages render without auth session
- `collection_status` absent case shows neutral verification message (no crash)
- No sensitive payment data exposed in page source
- `pnpm typecheck` passes for `apps/web`

tasks.title: Write checkout smoke test runbook
tasks.description:
Document the staging smoke test runbook for the checkout flow.

File: `.claude/specs/SPEC-091-mvp-blockers/staging-runbook.md` (new)

Content (9-step procedure from spec):
1. Configure MercadoPago sandbox credentials in staging env
2. Open `/suscriptores/planes` and verify `PlanPurchaseButton` renders for each plan
3. Click a plan CTA as authenticated user → verify redirect to MP checkout page (sandbox)
4. Complete payment with MP sandbox test card (approved scenario)
5. Verify redirect to `/suscriptores/checkout/success` with `collection_status=approved`
6. Verify subscription status updated in `/mi-cuenta/suscripcion`
7. Repeat step 4 with pending test card → verify redirect to `/suscriptores/checkout/pending`
8. Repeat step 4 with rejected test card → verify redirect to `/suscriptores/checkout/failure` + retry CTA
9. Pre-beta real transaction checklist (verify webhook HMAC, verify idempotency key, verify invoice email)

Acceptance criteria:
- Runbook file exists at the specified path
- All 9 steps documented with sufficient detail for a developer unfamiliar with the flow
- Pre-beta checklist section present and covers HMAC, idempotency, and email verification
